pending.name: Samsung Biologics / Undisclosed CDMO
pending.note: Samsung Biologics is reportedly acquiring an undisclosed global contract development and manufacturing organization (CDMO) for approximately 2.7 trillion KRW (~$2B USD).

pending.name: ABB / Rotork
pending.note: ABB announced a definitive agreement to acquire Rotork, a UK-based flow control and actuation specialist, to expand its industrial automation portfolio.

pending.name: Ondas / Design Technologies
pending.note: US-based Ondas is acquiring Design Technologies in a deal valued at approximately KRW 1.3 trillion (~$1B USD), per Korean media reports. The transaction expands Ondas's technology portfolio into design software/services.

pending.name: Count Limited / Oracle Group
pending.note: Count Limited has completed its acquisition of Oracle Group, a financial advisory and professional services firm. The deal expands Count's professional services portfolio. No financial terms were disclosed in the announcement.

pending.name: TSMC
pending.note: TSMC announced an additional $100B capital expenditure commitment to expand its Arizona semiconductor fabrication facilities, driven by surging AI chip demand.

pending.name: Game Your Game Inc.
pending.note: Game Your Game Inc. (ticker: GYGY) filed an S-1/A amendment with the SEC, indicating the company is progressing toward an IPO on a U.S. exchange. The filing is under SIC 7372 (Prepackaged Software). No pricing terms or valuation details are disclosed in the amendment.

pending.name: Siemens / Precision Innovations
pending.note: Siemens announced the acquisition of Precision Innovations to expand its EDA portfolio with AI-powered system-on-a-chip (SoC) design exploration and optimization capabilities.

pending.name: Samsung Biologics / peptide API manufacturer
pending.note: Samsung Biologics is acquiring an unnamed peptide active pharmaceutical ingredient (API) manufacturer for $1.8B, broadening its CDMO capabilities beyond biologics into peptide small-molecule synthesis.

pending.name: Thesis Elements / 3D Technologies LLC
pending.note: Thesis Elements has acquired 3D Technologies LLC, a longtime strategic technology partner supporting its cloud-native Student Information System for higher education.

pending.name: Paramount / Warner Bros.
pending.note: A federal judge issued a temporary restraining order halting Paramount's $111B acquisition of Warner Bros., finding the merger likely violates antitrust laws. The injunction represents a significant regulatory setback for one of the largest media consolidations on record.

pending.name: Graphy
pending.note: Korean startup Graphy raised approximately KRW 60 billion (~$44M) in a funding round described as a precursor to acquiring Ray, signaling an M&A-oriented capital raise.

pending.name: Euisun Chung / Boston Dynamics
pending.note: Hyundai Motor Group chairman Euisun Chung is reportedly considering acquiring an additional 25% stake in Boston Dynamics. The move could accelerate a Nasdaq IPO for the robotics company. No financial terms have been disclosed; the deal remains at the consideration stage.

pending.name: TeraWulf
pending.note: TeraWulf shares traded below the April follow-on offering price following news of a reported $19B Anthropic data-center lease agreement, suggesting the equity raise priced at levels that the market now views as stretched relative to subsequent dilution.

pending.name: OpenAI / AMD
pending.note: Reports indicate OpenAI is exploring a minority equity stake in AMD as part of an AI chip supply deal, sending AMD shares up approximately 25%.

pending.name: Netflix / InterPositive
pending.note: Netflix acquired InterPositive, a generative AI filmmaking startup co-founded by Ben Affleck, for $587M in cash. The deal signals Netflix's aggressive push to integrate AI into content production workflows.

pending.name: Samsung Biologics / Polypeptide Group
pending.note: Samsung Biologics is acquiring Swiss peptide CDMO Polypeptide Group for approximately KRW 2.7 trillion (~$2B), described as the largest M&A deal in Korean biotech history.

pending.name: Powertech / Broadcom
pending.note: Powertech Technology plans to form a joint venture with Broadcom in Singapore focused on advanced semiconductor packaging. Financial terms and ownership stakes have not been disclosed.

pending.name: Qualcomm / (undisclosed target)
pending.note: Qualcomm's $3.9B deal is cited as a competitive challenge to Nvidia in the AI chip market amid rising power demand and supply constraints. The specific target and deal structure are not disclosed in this snippet.

pending.name: 3KNIGHTS DYNAMICS GROUP Ltd
pending.note: 3KNIGHTS DYNAMICS GROUP Ltd (ticker: TKDG) filed an F-1/A amendment with the SEC, indicating an updated IPO registration for this Cayman/foreign private issuer in the software and IT services sector (SIC 7371). No deal size or valuation disclosed in the filing snippet.

pending.name: Truecaller / TextPlus
pending.note: Truecaller AB has entered into a definitive agreement to acquire 100% of US-based TextPlus Inc., a communications software company.

pending.name: Meta / Anthropic
pending.note: Meta and Anthropic are in early-stage talks for a data centre deal valued at up to $10bn, representing a significant AI infrastructure commitment between a major hyperscaler and a leading AI lab. The deal structure is not yet finalised and the reported figure is aspirational.

pending.name: FG Merger II Corp. / BOXABL Inc.
pending.note: BOXABL completed its de-SPAC business combination with FG Merger II Corp. at a stated $3.5B valuation (aspirational), with shares commencing Nasdaq trading on July 20, 2026. BOXABL manufactures foldable, factory-built housing units designed for rapid deployment.

pending.name: TSMC
pending.note: Trump announced TSMC will commit an additional $100 billion in US manufacturing investment, expanding its existing Arizona fab commitments. The announcement signals continued onshoring of semiconductor capacity under US industrial policy pressure.

pending.name: Airties / Aprecomm
pending.note: Airties acquired Aprecomm, an AI-driven connectivity management startup, to strengthen its network experience platform capabilities. The transaction bolsters Airties' AI-powered broadband optimization offerings for service providers. Deal size was not disclosed.

pending.name: FreeCast
pending.note: FreeCast, Inc. (ticker CAST) filed an S-1 registration statement with the SEC on July 16, 2026, initiating the IPO process. FreeCast operates a streaming content aggregation platform. Deal size and valuation have not been disclosed in the filing snippet.

pending.name: NINJIO / SafeStack
pending.note: NINJIO has acquired SafeStack to integrate developer-focused secure code training into its human risk management platform. The deal broadens NINJIO's product suite beyond phishing simulation and awareness training into application security education.

pending.name: PointsKash / ChainBytes
pending.note: PointsKash completed the acquisition of software assets from ChainBytes, a kiosk and payments technology company, with ChainBytes founder Eric Grill joining the acquirer. The deal is structured as an asset acquisition rather than a full company purchase.

pending.name: ORTEC / TOBA HR Solutions
pending.note: ORTEC has acquired TOBA HR Solutions, a Belgian workforce-management provider serving 250+ healthcare organizations and approximately 225,000 frontline professionals.

pending.name: PartnerOne / ISI Analytics
pending.note: PartnerOne, a fast-growing enterprise software roll-up, has acquired ISI Analytics to bolster its enterprise collaboration analytics and reporting capabilities. The deal is intended to accelerate growth in communications intelligence and customer experience solutions.

pending.name: Madrivo / MoneyGeek
pending.note: Madrivo, a performance marketing platform, has acquired MoneyGeek, a personal finance content and comparison site. The combination aims to integrate trusted consumer finance content with Madrivo's performance marketing capabilities to expand distribution of financial products.

pending.name: VisualLogix / refyne Group
pending.note: VisualLogix acquired refyne Group to strengthen its European presence in engineering software. The transaction is a cross-border technology M&A deal, with no deal value disclosed in the announcement.

pending.name: Nextflex
pending.note: The final-bid process for Nextflex, a Korean flexible circuit board manufacturer, has been delayed, casting uncertainty over the expected ~800 billion KRW (~$580M) sale. No buyers have been announced and the timeline for closing the auction remains unclear.

pending.name: Calisa Acquisition / GoodVision AI
pending.note: Calisa Acquisition announced a de-SPAC combination with GoodVision AI, a computer vision and AI analytics company. The transaction follows GoodVision's admission into NVIDIA's Connect partner ecosystem, lending strategic credibility to the deal.

pending.name: Apple / SigScalr
pending.note: Apple is reported to be acquiring SigScalr, though the deal remains unconfirmed with no valuation disclosed. SigScalr appears to be a data/AI infrastructure company, suggesting Apple may be bolstering its enterprise or on-device AI capabilities.

pending.name: CSL Group / IoTM Solutions
pending.note: CSL Group has acquired IoTM Solutions Ltd, an eSIM management platform provider, to enhance its global eSIM orchestration capabilities.

pending.name: Micron / Texas Wafer Supplier
pending.note: Micron announced a $500M deal to secure wafer supply in Texas, aimed at strengthening its domestic semiconductor supply chain. The transaction appears to involve a fab partnership or supply agreement with a Texas-based wafer producer.

pending.name: Spark AI Foundry Holdings / EdgeMode
pending.note: Spark AI Foundry Holdings LLC submitted a non-binding offer to acquire EdgeMode's ready-to-build 300 MW AI data centre project located in Malpica, Spain. The transaction represents a potential asset sale of European AI infrastructure; deal value has not been disclosed.

pending.name: Skydance / Paramount
pending.note: State attorneys general have filed an antitrust challenge to the proposed Skydance-Paramount merger, alleging antitrust violations that could delay closing.

pending.name: Advasa Holdings, Inc.
pending.note: Advasa Holdings filed an S-1/A amendment with the SEC under ticker ADBT, indicating an updated IPO registration in the software sector (SIC 7372). No proceeds or valuation figures are disclosed in the filing snippet.

pending.name: Anshar Labs / Dealer World
pending.note: Anshar Labs acquired automotive marketing agency Dealer World to extend its Drivvr AI platform into the automotive retail vertical. The transaction also involved a new CEO appointment, signaling a leadership integration strategy. Deal terms were not disclosed.

pending.name: Anthropic / TeraWulf
pending.note: TeraWulf announced a reported $19B deal with Anthropic, featuring a $3.5B upfront payment component. The structure has drawn scrutiny regarding financing adequacy and whether the upfront payment is sufficient relative to total deal value.

pending.name: US Government / Intel
pending.note: Reports indicate the US government is acquiring a 10% minority stake in Intel, representing a significant government intervention in the domestic semiconductor sector.

pending.name: Tencent / Manus
pending.note: Tencent is in talks to acquire a significant minority or controlling stake in Manus, an AI startup, which would make it the largest shareholder per FT/Bloomberg reporting. Deal value and valuation are undisclosed.

pending.name: Nvidia / Lancium
pending.note: Nvidia and unnamed tech firms are reportedly eyeing minority stakes in Lancium, a power infrastructure company that serves as the backbone for the Stargate AI project. The deal structure involves minority stake acquisitions rather than full control.

pending.name: SK Hynix
pending.note: SK Hynix filed a 424B4 prospectus supplement with the SEC, indicating a public equity offering pricing event. The South Korean memory chip maker (DRAM/NAND/HBM) is tapping U.S. capital markets; deal size and proceeds are not disclosed in the filing snippet.

pending.name: EQT / Copia Power
pending.note: EQT is acquiring Copia Power, an integrated power and AI infrastructure platform that develops, owns, and operates large-scale energy and digital infrastructure campuses across the U.S. Copia partners with utilities to expand power capacity and support grid reliability…

pending.name: Micron Technology / GlobalWafers
pending.note: Micron Technology is making a $500M strategic investment in GlobalWafers to secure wafer supply chain relationships.

pending.name: NNS Holding / OCI
pending.note: NNS Holding (Cyprus) is acquiring a stake in OCI N.V. under Dutch public takeover decree rules, indicating a formal tender or stake acquisition process. The transaction structure suggests compliance with Dutch mandatory bid or voluntary tender offer regulations.

pending.name: Ohio Data Center Project
pending.note: A $4 billion data center development proposal in Ohio is reportedly on hold following a tentative deal, with potential Amazon involvement signaling continued hyperscaler-driven infrastructure buildout.

pending.name: Element Solutions / Solutics Advanced Materials
pending.note: Element Solutions has agreed to acquire Solutics Advanced Materials for $14.5 billion in a significant specialty materials deal targeting the semiconductor supply chain. The transaction represents a major consolidation in advanced materials used in chip manufacturing.

pending.name: Spring Valley Acquisition Corp. III / General Fusion
pending.note: General Fusion completed its de-SPAC business combination with Spring Valley Acquisition Corp. III, becoming the first publicly listed fusion energy company and beginning trading on Nasdaq.

pending.name: e& / Vodafone
pending.note: Emirates Telecommunications Group (e&) is divesting its minority stake in Vodafone for $5.95 billion following a strategic portfolio review. The transaction represents a significant exit from e&'s position in the UK-headquartered telecom giant.

pending.name: Meta / Unknown Target
pending.note: Meta is reportedly pursuing a $6.5B move to expand cloud and AI infrastructure capacity. The target and deal structure have not been disclosed; the report characterizes this as a capital deployment that could reflect M&A or elevated capex.

pending.name: Gloo Holdings
pending.note: Gloo Holdings (ticker: GLOO, SIC 7374 – Computer Processing and Data Preparation) filed a 424B4 final IPO prospectus with the SEC on 2026-07-09. No proceeds or pricing details are present in the available snippet.
